label: Autonomous research & AI scientist systems

node.label: Autonomous research & AI scientist systems
node.definition: Autonomous-research systems search literature, formulate hypotheses, design or run experiments, analyze evidence, write artifacts, and request human decisions.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
examples: workflows combining Autonomous research & AI scientist systems with Autonomous software-engineering agents
workflows combining Autonomous research & AI scientist systems with Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
workflows combining Autonomous research & AI scientist systems with Neural search, RAG & question answering
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Autonomous software-engineering agents, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins.
